Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone's eyes are locked[n]on their canvases.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's been so fun that the hours flew by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}Everyone. Attention, please![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}It seems the painting Hiraga-kun submitted to the contest really caught the eyes of the judges![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}And while it's highly unusual, they're going to reserve an award spot just for you, Hiraga-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Huh? I don't think I understand. What does that mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}It means you're guaranteed an award. At best you'll receive first place—at worst, an honorable mention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}The judges were impressed with your shading techniques and said you crafted a masterwork of realism.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}Congratulations, Hiraga-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}This is the art club's first real achievement![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}He said I could do whatever I want if I won.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}So this means I don't have to listen to him anymore, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}We should all do something special to celebrate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Especially you. I'm sorry if I made you worry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Let's go, {f 4 1}-kun. You're celebrating with us, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga expressed deep gratitude to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming better friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}I don't mean to interrupt the fun, but Hiraga-kun, I'd like to fill you in on a few details.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 200}But don't worry, it shouldn't take long. The rest of you can wait outside the faculty office if you'd like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I went to the faculty office with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
